summary: Completed comprehensive testing of role-based navigation and page views. All navigation items are correctly displayed based on user role. Admin sees 'All Orders', 'All Receipts', 'Loyalty Program', 'All Ratings', 'Customer Service'. Customer sees 'My Orders', 'Receipts', 'Loyalty', 'My Ratings', 'Support'. Operator sees 'My Orders', 'Receipts', 'My Ratings', 'Support' - NO Loyalty menu. All page titles and content are role-appropriate.
passed_tests: Admin navigation shows: Dashboard, Services, Service Management, All Orders, All Receipts, Loyalty Program, Admin Config, All Ratings, Customer Service, Settings
Admin navigation does NOT show: Support, My Orders, Receipts, Loyalty, My Ratings
Admin 'All Orders' page shows correct title 'All Orders' with description 'View and manage all orders across the platform'
Admin 'All Receipts' page shows correct title 'All Receipts' with description 'View and manage all receipts across the platform'

Admin 'Loyalty Program' page shows management interface with: Total Members (2,847), Points Issued (458,900), Points Redeemed (125,600), Active Rewards (6), Tier breakdown, Overview/Rewards/Members tabs, Tier Configuration, Point Earning Rules

Admin 'All Ratings' page shows 'All Ratings' title with 'View and monitor all ratings across the platform' description, filters (All Services, All Ratings), stats cards (Total Reviews, Avg Rating, Responded, Needs Response), rating distribution chart
Customer navigation shows: Dashboard, Services, My Orders, Receipts, Loyalty, My Ratings, Support, Settings
Customer navigation does NOT show: All Orders, All Receipts, Loyalty Program, All Ratings, Customer Service, Admin Config, Service Management

Customer 'Loyalty' page shows customer view with: 'Loyalty Rewards' title, 'My Loyalty Program' section, Current Tier (Bronze), Available Points/Total Earned/Redeemed stats, Referral Code section, Rewards/Activity/My Rewards tabs
Customer 'Loyalty' page does NOT show admin elements: Total Members, Points Issued, Manage Rewards, Members tab
Operator navigation shows: Dashboard, Services, Service Management, Team & Roles, Admin Config, My Orders, Receipts, My Ratings, Support, Settings
Operator navigation does NOT show: Loyalty, Loyalty Program (correctly removed for operators)
Operator navigation does NOT show admin items: All Orders, All Receipts, All Ratings, Customer Service
critical_code_review_comments: Layout.jsx correctly implements role-based navigation with different menu items for admin/super_admin, operator, and customer roles
Orders.jsx correctly shows 'All Orders' title for admin and 'My Orders' for customers/operators based on isAllOrdersView flag
Receipts.jsx correctly shows 'All Receipts' title for admin and 'Receipts' for customers/operators based on isAllReceiptsView flag
Loyalty.jsx correctly renders AdminLoyaltyView for admin/super_admin and customer Loyalty view for customers, with operators getting 'Access Restricted' message
Ratings.jsx correctly renders AdminRatingsView for admin, OperatorRatingsView for operators, and CustomerRatingsView for customers
Admin loyalty stats and members list use MOCK data as noted in the review request

operator.note: Check 'I'm logging in as a service operator' checkbox

seed_data_creation: Used existing test accounts from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based navigation and page views fully tested. Admin sees management-oriented labels (All Orders, All Receipts, Loyalty Program, All Ratings, Customer Service). Customer sees personal labels (My Orders, Receipts, Loyalty, My Ratings, Support). Operator sees filtered labels (My Orders, Receipts, My Ratings, Support) with NO Loyalty menu. All page content is role-appropriate. Admin loyalty stats use MOCK data.
mocked_data_note: Admin loyalty stats (Total Members: 2,847, Points Issued: 458,900, etc.) and members list use MOCK data. Admin ratings list also uses MOCK data when no real data exists.
